zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Neale II於1429年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛時，他的父親Thomas Neale29歲，母親Johanna Thomas29歲。他於1454年10月29日與Johanna Wilkinson在英國萊希斯特斯爾可朗斯頓 可利亞爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1494年12月13日在他的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Neale II于1429年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛时，他的父亲Thomas Neale29岁，母亲Johanna Thomas29岁。他于1454年10月29日与Johanna Wilkinson在英国萊希斯特斯爾可朗斯頓 可利亞爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1494年12月13日在他的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Neale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Neal
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French, Anglo-Norman French, and Middle English personal name Neel, Nele, Nihel, Niel, itself derived from the Latin name Nigellus (a diminutive of Latin niger ‘black’), originally a nickname for someone with black hair or a dark complexion. The name was very common among Normans and was brought to England at the time of the Norman Conquest. There has been considerable confusion with the Irish and Scottish Gaelic name Niall (see Neil ); the two names are now pronounced identically. It is theoretically possible that in Normandy, where the personal name was popular, that it was also used for Old Norse Njáll, but this is difficult to prove. Njáll was adopted from the Irish Gaelic personal name Niall by Vikings in Ireland, who took it back to Iceland and Norway, but whether the Vikings also took Njáll to Normandy and to the northwest of England, is an open question, which cannot be settled on the available evidence.
English: alternatively from the Middle English personal name Nele, a variant of Nell as a pet form of Elias (see Ellis ). Compare Nelson , Nielson .
Scottish and Irish: shortened form of   McNeal   (see   McNeil  ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Neale II was born in 1429, in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Thomas Neale, was 29 and his mother, Johanna Thomas, was 29. He married Johanna Wilkinson on 29 October 1454, in Croxton Kerrial, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 13 December 1494, in his hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Neale II est né en 1429, à Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Neale, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Johanna Thomas, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Wilkinson le 29 octobre 1454, à Croxton Kerrial, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1494, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

Oktober 1454 in Croxton Kerrial, Leicestershire, England Johanna Wilkinson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Dezember 1494 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Neale II è nato il nel 1429 nel Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Neale, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Thomas, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Wilkinson il 29 ottobre 1454, nel Croxton Kerrial, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 dicembre 1494, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Neale IIが1429年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエレスボロウで生まれた時，父Thomas Nealeは29歳，母Johanna Thomasは29歳であった。1454年10月29日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアクロクストン ケリアルでJohanna Wilkinsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1494年12月13日に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Neale II(이)가 1429년 영국 벅잉함실르 엘레스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Neale(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Thomas(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1454년 10월 29일 영국 레이스스터실르 크록스턴 케리앨에서 Johanna Wilkinson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1494년 12월 13일 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Neale II nasceu em 1429, em Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Neale, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Thomas, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Wilkinson em 29 de outubro de 1454, em Croxton Kerrial, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1494, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Neale II родился в 1429 г. в местности эллесбороую, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Neale было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Thomas, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Wilkinson 29 октября 1454 г. в местности крокстон кирряль, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 13 декабря 1494 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Neale II nació en 1429, en Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Neale, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Johanna Thomas, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Johanna Wilkinson el 29 de octubre de 1454, en Croxton Kerrial, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1494, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años.
